name.full: D365 Business Performance Analytics Cowork Plugin

description.short: Financial analytics for CFO and Finance teams via D365 BPA.
description.full: Connects Microsoft 365 Copilot and VS Code to Dynamics 365 Business Performance Analytics. Delivers AI-assisted financial analysis for CFO, Controllers, FP&A, and Finance teams across 10 skills: P&L and profitability, cash flow projection, AR/AP aging, budget variance, spending behaviour analysis, intercompany reconciliation, vendor performance, period-end close, ROI and capital scenarios, and CFO-level KPI dashboards. Uses live DAX queries against your BPA dataset — no manual exports needed.

agentConnectors.description: Remote MCP connector to the Microsoft-hosted Business Performance Analytics MCP server. Provides live DAX query execution and schema discovery across Record-to-Report, Procure-to-Pay, and Order-to-Cash datasets.
